TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 6, Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1929) mrhuw Kuwait ta' misuw hya' ga Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~ɕaβaħ al-aħma* al-*aβer al-s~ɕaβaħ rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, s~ɕaβaħ al-aħma* al-*aβer al-s~ɕaβaħ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw kuwait taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaβaħ al-aħma* al-*aβer al-s~ɕaβaħ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 6, Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1929) mrhuw Kuwait ta' misuw hya' ga Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw kuwait taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaβaħ al-aħma* al-*aβer al-s~ɕaβaħ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
